name: Democrats.org
subject: We want you to meet Elizabeth Warren in D.C. - for free!
body:
Do you want to meet Senator Warren at the next Democrats Live?
---
**Pitch in $10 or more before midnight tonight, and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to meet Senator Elizabeth Warren at the next taping of Democrats Live!
**[ENTER NOW](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb33/4067b0a/2dada9681/7e7e38f0/264523075/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-Elizabeth-Warren-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ENTER+NOW&utm_campaign=em_20170318_eg_dc&source=em_20170318_eg_dc&refcode=em_20170318_eg_dc")****
Friend --

I'm Eddie, and I'm the Director of Video at the DNC. You've probably seen a lot of our team's work if you follow us on Facebook or Twitter. We're the ones spending hours and hours putting together all those videos about the terrible things Trump is doing. Yes -- I feel bad for us, too.

But lately I've been focused on our latest awesome project: Democrats Live.

We rolled out our first episode of Democrats Live last week, and it's my job to make sure everything runs smoothly -- and also that I don't drop any cameras. Equipment issues aside, I'm determined to make sure we're engaging in an important dialogue with our grassroots supporters like you, and that we have engaging guests who will give our audience (that's you!) a great show every week.

So I am thrilled that we're going to have Senator Elizabeth Warren joining Deputy Chair Ellison in our studio for next week's episode. **[This is your chance to be here, too!](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb33/4067b0a/2dada9681/7e7e38fe/264523075/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-Elizabeth-Warren-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+CUSTOMDATASETslugwhitelistcommaletterkey&utm_campaign=em_20170318_eg_dc&source=em_20170318_eg_dc&refcode=em_20170318_eg_dc")**

Every time I hear Sen. Warren speak, I'm reminded why I'm a Democrat and why I do this work here at DNC HQ to fight for things that matter. She's a constant inspiration for me -- and an important voice for our party as we take on the Trump administration and the threat it poses to everyday Americans.

So, I'm an admitted Elizabeth Warren fanatic. And that's why I want to make sure you have the chance to meet Elizabeth Warren in person and feel her proud, progressive, powerful energy up close. I'm sure that meeting her will inspire you to use your voice and stand up for our values.

Pitch in $10 or whatever you can before midnight tonight, and you'll be automatically entered for an overnight stay at a great hotel in D.C., seats in our studio audience for next week's taping of Democrats Live, and a chance to meet Sen. Warren after the show. Oh, and you can bring a friend along with you -- because everything's better with a friend to share it with!

Enter today.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb33/4067b0a/2dada9681/7e7e38fc/264523075/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/meet-elizabeth-warren?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170318_eg_dc&source=em_20170318_eg_dc&refcode=em_20170318_eg_dc")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb33/4067b0a/2dada9681/7e7e38fd/264523075/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/meet-elizabeth-warren?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170318_eg_dc&source=em_20170318_eg_dc&refcode=em_20170318_eg_dc")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb33/4067b0a/2dada9681/7e7e38fa/264523075/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/meet-elizabeth-warren?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170318_eg_dc&source=em_20170318_eg_dc&refcode=em_20170318_eg_dc")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb33/4067b0a/2dada9681/7e7e38fb/264523075/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/meet-elizabeth-warren?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170318_eg_dc&source=em_20170318_eg_dc&refcode=em_20170318_eg_dc")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb33/4067b0a/2dada9681/7e7e38f8/264523075/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/meet-elizabeth-warren?express_lane=true&amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20170318_eg_dc&source=em_20170318_eg_dc&refcode=em_20170318_eg_dc")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb33/4067b0a/2dada9681/7e7e38f9/264523075/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-Elizabeth-Warren-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170318_eg_dc&source=em_20170318_eg_dc&refcode=em_20170318_eg_dc")
** Hope to see you next week! (You'll be able to recognize me -- I'll be the one running around the studio giving everything one last check before we go live.)

Eddie

Eddie Geller
Director of Video
Democratic National Committee

P.S. -- You can also meet me, too, if you want. But admittedly I haven't been a lifelong champion of the middle class like Sen. Warren.

|

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by 3/18/17. [Enter by contributing here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb33/4067b0a/2dada9681/7e7e3880/264523075/VEsHAg/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-elizabeth-warren?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+Enter+by+contributing+here&utm_campaign=em_20170318_eg_dc&source=em_20170318_eg_dc&refcode=em_20170318_eg_dc"), or click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb33/4067b0a/2dada9681/7e7e3881/264523075/VEsHDQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-elizabeth-warren-contest-signup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170318_eg_dc&source=em_20170318_eg_dc&refcode=em_20170318_eg_dc") to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Washington, DC; one (1) night's hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; the opportunity for winner and winner's guest to attend a DNC event on 3/21/17 (approximate retail value of all prizes $3,000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb33/4067b0a/2dada9681/7e7e388e/264523075/VEsHDA/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-elizabeth-warren-contest-rules?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=19+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em_20170318_eg_dc&source=em_20170318_eg_dc&refcode=em_20170318_eg_dc") and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003.

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb33/4067b0a/2dada9681/7e7e388f/264523075/VEsEBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=20+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170318_eg_dc&source=em_20170318_eg_dc&refcode=em_20170318_eg_dc"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb33/4067b0a/2dada9681/7e7e388c/264523075/VEsEBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=21+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170318_eg_dc&source=em_20170318_eg_dc&refcode=em_20170318_eg_dc"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb33/4067b0a/2dada9681/7e7e388d/264523075/VEsEBw/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=22+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170318_eg_dc&source=em_20170318_eg_dc&refcode=em_20170318_eg_dc") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb33/4067b0a/2dada9681/7e7e388a/264523075/VEsEBg/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=23+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170318_eg_dc&source=em_20170318_eg_dc&refcode=em_20170318_eg_dc"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Elizabeth Warren. Me. You. It's gonna be good.
body:
You and a friend could meet Sen. Warren in Washington, D.C. next week!
---
**Pitch in $10 or more before midnight, and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to meet Senator Elizabeth Warren at the next taping of Democrats Live on Tuesday!
**[ENTER NOW](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb4d/4067b0a/2da991981/7e7e21e6/2808025351/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-Elizabeth-Warren-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ENTER+NOW&utm_campaign=em_20170318_ke_dc&source=em_20170318_ke_dc&refcode=em_20170318_ke_dc")****
My good friend Elizabeth Warren is joining me next week on Democrats Live, and I'd love for you to be here with us.

**[Chip in $10 or whatever you can to support our party, and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to win tickets for two to be in our studio audience -- and have a chat with Elizabeth after the show!](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb4d/4067b0a/2da991981/7e7e21e4/2808025351/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-Elizabeth-Warren-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+10+or+whatever+you+can+to+suppor&utm_campaign=em_20170318_ke_dc&source=em_20170318_ke_dc&refcode=em_20170318_ke_dc")**

Hundreds of thousands of Democrats tuned in for our first episode to hear me and Tom Perez talk about the state of our party and the steps Democrats can start taking right now to get us back on track to win at the local, state, and national level again. And on last week's show, we had a great discussion about how Democrats can stop the disastrous Republican health care bill.

This is such an important conversation for Democrats to be having right now because there's so much to be done to resist the Trump agenda and get our party back in fighting form. I can't wait for Elizabeth to join me next week to keep it going -- and I really hope you can come be a part of it.

The DNC will cover an overnight stay at a great hotel and all the other logistics for the lucky winner and a guest. All you have to do is get your name in the hat.

Don't miss out -- pitch in $10 or more to be automatically entered.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

** Good luck, and we'll see you next week.

Keith

name: Sen. Sheldon Whitehouse (via DSCC.org)
subject: re: What Trump's budget means for the environment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Have you heard that last year was the hottest on record?
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e253/2b07114c/58259d63/736bc8a1/3926730428/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-budget?source=PT-20170318-Whitehouse-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")
Friend, have you heard that last year was the hottest on record?

I've made sure that my colleagues in the Senate have. With 158+ weekly Senate speeches on climate change, I've been a broken record on the serious threat of global warming -- and so has the _entire_ scientific community.

Donald Trump has access to the same news we have, but **his administration just introduced a budget that would cut 31% of the budget and thousands of jobs at the Environmental Protection Agency.** He's so allergic to facts that Trump's budget even proposes cutting the NOAA, which runs our national weather service and researches how to help communities adapt to rising temperatures.

It's nearly inconceivable that, despite the scientific consensus around the catastrophe of climate change, a climate antagonist is at the helm of the EPA -- and the agency's future is in jeopardy.

As _The Washington Post_ says, "almost no other federal department or agency is as much in the crosshairs" as the EPA. **Of all the destructive policies of Trump 's administration, this crusade against the environment may end up being the most irreversible.**

I want to make sure my colleagues in the Senate know that grassroots supporters are watching -- and are ready to fight this budget AND stand up for the environment.

**Will you take a moment to get your opposition to these EPA cuts on the record? Add your name:**

**[http://dscc.org/fight-trump-budget](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e253/2b07114c/58259d63/736bc8a1/3926730428/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-budget?source=PT-20170318-Whitehouse-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

Thanks for your time -- and for staying engaged in the fight for our planet.

Sen. Sheldon Whitehouse

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e253/2b07114c/58259d63/736bc8a0/3926730428/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e253/2b07114c/58259d63/736bc8a3/3926730428/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. It's nearly inconceivable that, despite the scientific consensus around the catastrophe of climate change, a climate antagonist is at the helm of the EPA -- and the agency's future is in jeopardy. As The Washington Post says, "almost no other federal department or agency is as much in the crosshairs" as the EPA. Of all the destructive policies of Trump 's administration, this crusade against the environment may end up being the most irreversible. I want to make sure my colleagues in the Senate know that grassroots supporters are watching -- and are ready to fight this budget AND stand up for the environment. Will you take a moment to get your opposition to these EPA cuts on the record? Add your name: "=" Thanks for your time -- and for staying engaged in the fight for our planet. Sen. name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Help us stop Wall Street's nominee
body:
Join Senator Bernie Sanders and the Resist the Hostile Takeover
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Jay Clayton has made a career of representing Wall Street clients like Goldman Sachs when they've broken the rules at the Securities and Exchange Commission. Now Donald Trump has nominated him to be the chair of the SEC and enforce their rules. **Join Senator Bernie Sanders and the Resist the Hostile Takeover coalition of Our Revolution, Public Citizen, Allied Progress and Good Jobs Nation in opposition to this dangerous Wall Street power grab:**
[**Resist the Hostile Takeover Day of Action**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a41/43f17890/ded5d2f0/62000d74/804280489/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/volunteeractivityormeeting/gpg7cc?source=em170318-dc")
Our Revolution DC Office
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
Wednesday, March 22 12:30 p.m. - 3:00 p.m. EDT
**[RSVP TO ATTEND»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a41/43f17890/ded5d2f0/62000d74/804280489/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/volunteeractivityormeeting/gpg7cc?source=em170318-dc")**
Donald Trump promised to be tough on Goldman Sachs and other big banks that made a killing off of sticking it to working families. But so far, he's just promoted them from Wall Street to 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue. [**We can't count on yet another Wall Street insider to be tough on the big banks. Attend our Day of Action this Wednesday.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a41/43f17890/ded5d2f0/62000d74/804280489/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/volunteeractivityormeeting/gpg7cc?source=em170318-dc")
Thank you for taking action with us against this dangerous nomination.
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution

subject: LAST CHANCE: Meet Elizabeth Warren - for free!
body:

**Pitch in $10 or more before midnight tonight, and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to meet Senator Elizabeth Warren at the next taping of Democrats Live!

Hey -- have I got an exciting opportunity for you!

**[You and a friend could meet Elizabeth Warren and be in our studio audience when she records the next episode of Democrats Live -- just pitch in now and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to win!](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb49/4067b0a/2da4790ca/7e7e00e3/3821973152/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-Elizabeth-Warren-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+You+and+a+friend+could+meet+Elizabeth+Wa&utm_campaign=em_20170318_as_dc&source=em_20170318_as_dc&refcode=em_20170318_as_dc")**
